overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a rural dirt path through lush summer countryside. The character crosses a wooden bridge, passes through a small settlement with wooden market stalls and colorful banners, and continues into a densely forested area while encountering a pedestrian on the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path with stone walls

events.description: crossing the wooden bridge over a small stream

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along a dirt path beside a stone wall, approaching and crossing a wooden bridge

entered.detail: low stone wall running alongside the left side of the path
wooden footbridge with railings crossing a stream
tall evergreen trees in the background

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow dirt path bordered by a stone wall on the left and tall grass on the right. The path leads to a wooden bridge which the character crosses over a small stream, with pine trees visible in the distance under a partly cloudy sky.

events.description: rural settlement with wooden structures and colorful banners becomes visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding path with a stone wall now on the right side, approaching a rural settlement

entered.detail: simple wooden fence marking the edge of the settlement area
cluster of wooden buildings and structures with red and yellow banners

segments.scene_description: After crossing the bridge, the path curves through open countryside with the stone wall now on the right. A rural settlement with wooden structures and colorful banners comes into view in the distance as the character approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor market area with wooden stalls and festival banners

events.description: entering the settlement area with wooden market stalls and carts

agents.ego_description: walking through the settlement area, passing wooden carts and market stalls decorated with banners

entered.detail: wooden wagons and carts parked alongside the path
market stalls with wooden frames and red drapes
red and yellow triangular flags strung between wooden posts overhead

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a lively settlement area featuring wooden market stalls, parked carts, and colorful festival banners strung overhead. The path winds between the structures as Geralt continues forward through the semi-covered market space.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural nature trail with tall grass

events.description: passing a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction on the narrow path

agents.ego_description: leaving the settlement behind and walking along a nature trail, passing a pedestrian in a red shirt

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red shirt walking toward the camera on the left side of the path

entered.detail: wooden wagon with a canvas cover parked on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Exiting the settlement, the path returns to a natural setting with tall grass and wildflowers lining both sides. A covered wagon sits parked on the right as Geralt continues walking, passing a pedestrian in a red shirt walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with canopy cover

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a densely forested area with tall trees and dappled sunlight filtering through the canopy

entered.detail: thick forest with tall trees and dense undergrowth creating a canopy overhead

segments.scene_description: The trail enters a densely wooded area where the trees form a partial canopy overhead, creating dappled lighting patterns on the path. Tall grass and thick vegetation line both sides of the narrow dirt trail as Geralt continues walking through the serene forest environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Geralt travels from an open rural path through a festive settlement and into a dense forest. It begins with the character walking along a narrow dirt path bordered by a stone wall and tall grass before crossing a wooden bridge over a small stream. As the path curves through the open countryside, the scene opens up to reveal a rural settlement filled with wooden market stalls, parked carts, and colorful banners strung overhead. The camera then follows Geralt as he exits the village and passes a pedestrian in a red shirt beside a parked covered wagon, with the terrain shifting back to wildflowers and tall grass. Finally, the trail winds into a densely wooded area where the trees form a partial canopy, casting dappled light across the narrow path and thick vegetation.
